历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 8299 → 24195 → 13252 → 20584 → 7414, with significant fluctuations in the past 5 years. In 2022, due to the A1 segment Sino-foreign cooperative education, there was a substantial drop, followed by a recovery in 2023, and in 2025 it rebounded to 7414, the best level in the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 7414. The university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for science (physics category) was 200 students from 2021 to 2023, 193 in 2024, 201 in 2025, and 201 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 approximately 54th (48th in 2025, 52nd in 2024), with recent rankings fluctuating between 48–55, overall stable. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the incident of giant unknown biological activity around the Nanhu campus, triggering a Level 1 response and class suspension, which may have a certain negative impact on candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking 98th (average evaluation), low exposure on short video platforms. No obvious signal of enrollment gaps in historical abnormal admission records. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), Mechanical Engineering (A-) are representative advantageous disciplines, highly related to the university's science and engineering enrollment majors, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other science and engineering majors are highly recommended in social heat; mechanical/intelligent manufacturing is divided and wait-and-see; materials (biochemical and environmental materials categories) generally wait-and-see; civil engineering is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in this province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan City, Hubei Province, in the central region, with some regional appeal to Shanxi candidates. The university's enrollment in Shanxi Province accounts for about 2.5%–4.7% of the national total (2021–2025), not a local university, with no local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7414, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, a 3.4% decrease in local physics category candidates slightly easing competition, a somewhat negative reputation and a slight drop in Soft Science ranking mildly suppressing application heat, with a minor correction based on the main supply-demand elasticity value, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 7364, with a range of 6864–7864.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 6864–7864, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 6800), you can focus on challenging Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 7800), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
